title: National Council for Technical Education (Grant of Autonomous Status to National Defence College) Order, 2015
title_en: National Council for Technical Education (Grant of Autonomous Status to National Defence College) Order, 2015

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the National Council for Technical Education (grant of Autonomous Status to National Defence College) Order, 2015.

provisions.title: Grant of autonomy
provisions.content: The National Defence College is hereby declared to be an autonomous institution.
